title: Patterned Mosaics
description: Adds decorative patterned glass + New Terracotta Blocks to Minecraft!
body:
![Title Header](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/2282d51cf1ba2d5d08d4c42567b498f5538886fd.png)




Patterned Mosaics is a vanilla+ decoration mod that brings beautiful mosaic patterns inspired by glazed terracotta to both stained glass and solid terracotta blocks!

Building on the popular Patterned Glass mod (full credit to thenamesnano/ReviversMC/tnoctua), this port adds:

 

- Patterned Glass & Panes — All 16 colors of stained glass blocks and panes overlaid with classic glazed terracotta patterns. Rotate them to align and create stunning transparent mosaics, windows, or beacons with colorful effects.
- New: Patterned Terracotta — Opaque solid blocks in all 16 colors, featuring upscaled 32x32 mosaic-oriented textures for richer detail and seamless tiling. Perfect for floors, walls, accents, or combining with glass for layered designs

  Fully compatible with NeoForge 1.21.1, lightweight and designed to blend perfectly with vanilla while pairing amazingly with mods like Immersive Furniture, Macaw's windows/doors, or Create deco.

 

Crafting Recipes can be viewed using JEI!

 

Unleash your inner artist—build intricate mosaics, modern facades, ancient ruins, or cozy patterned interiors without breaking vanilla aesthetics!

 

Feel free to include in modpacks.
